# OSS Protector

> OSS Protector is a free, community-run GitHub App and public directory that flags AI-generated spam and abusive pull-request activity before it reaches a maintainer's review queue. It scores accounts with transparent, public signals and lets any maintainer review, confirm, dismiss, or appeal a flag.

OSS Protector is open source (MIT) and built by maintainers, for maintainers. It never comments on or blocks pull requests directly — flagged contributors surface in a maintainer's in-app dashboard and notifications. Every flag is public and every scoring weight is documented.

## How it scores

- Account heuristics: account age, prior commit history, bio and handle patterns
- Diff signature: LLM-authored patch vocabulary, indentation, and comment style
- Cross-repo correlation: the same account flagged or dismissed across many repositories
- Confidence is a transparent weighted sum of independent signals, auditable on the methodology page

## Key pages

- [Home](https://oss-protector.raedbahri90.workers.dev/): what OSS Protector is and how it works
- [Public feed](https://oss-protector.raedbahri90.workers.dev/feed): the live public review queue of flagged accounts
- [Accounts directory](https://oss-protector.raedbahri90.workers.dev/accounts): browse scored accounts
- [Methodology](https://oss-protector.raedbahri90.workers.dev/methodology): how confidence is computed and the signal weights
- [Appeal a flag](https://oss-protector.raedbahri90.workers.dev/appeal): for accounts that believe they were wrongly flagged
- [Sponsors](https://oss-protector.raedbahri90.workers.dev/sponsors): how the project stays free
- [Source code](https://github.com/lord007tn/oss-protector): the GitHub repository

## Facts

- Price: free for everyone, forever — no paid tiers
- License: MIT, open source
- Hosting: Cloudflare Workers and D1
- It does not post bot comments or status checks on pull requests
